greeting.title: Greeting
greeting.response: Hello! 👋 Welcome to SupportGenie AI. How may I assist you today?

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.response: Our refund policy allows refunds within 7 days of purchase. The amount will be credited to your original payment method within 5-7 business days after approval.

payment.title: Payment Support
payment.response: Please verify your payment details. If the payment has been deducted but the order was not placed, our support team will assist you.

order_status.title: Order Tracking
order_status.response: Your order is currently being processed. You can also track your order using the tracking ID available in your Orders section.

delivery.title: Delivery Information
delivery.response: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days. Express delivery usually arrives within 1-2 business days.

cancellation.title: Order Cancellation
cancellation.response: You can cancel your order before it has been shipped. Once shipped, you may initiate a return after delivery.

unknown.title: Unknown Query
unknown.response: I'm sorry, I couldn't understand your request. Could you please rephrase it? If needed, I'll connect you with our AI assistant.
